description: The video discusses the Dabba Wireless Network in India, co-founded by Shubhendu Sharma and Karam Lakshman, which aims to provide Internet connectivity in emerging markets using blockchain technology. It highlights their journey from a personal use case to a scalable product that enables individuals to sponsor Internet connections for those in need.
topic_summary: Dabba Wireless Network leverages blockchain to provide high-speed Internet access to underserved populations, aiming to connect a billion people. The initiative has already enabled 11,000 locations and plans to expand significantly over the next decade [t=112.98].
